data-refinement.title: Data refinement & hygiene — finish descriptions/notes quality pass and edge cleanup
data-refinement.notes: Core type migration and date population are complete. Remaining work is quality completion for ainews/article/guest/entity notes and edge-context cleanup.

tasks.text: Phase 0: Audit + graph structure decision (flat types, no hubs)
Phase 1: Node type migration + junk cleanup + duplicate merges
Phase 1: Publish dates for all content nodes
Phase 1: Podcast, paper-club, and builders-club descriptions + notes
Phase 2: AINews descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Article descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Guest descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Entity descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Edge context cleanup + verification pass

hub-nodes.title: Hub node architecture — anchor LS properties and absorb storyline-ready narrative links
hub-nodes.notes: Creates anchor nodes for the core Latent Space properties and links content to them. Storylines scope from PRD-08 is merged here as a focused narrative-link layer (timeline edges and evolving-arc metadata on hub-linked content). Includes canonical-name hygiene pass for host aliases and common extraction misspellings.

tasks.text: Create/update core hub nodes and remove duplicate Latent Space entities
Connect hubs to all relevant content nodes with explicit edge explanations
Add storyline carryover: timeline-oriented edges and arc notes on hub-linked clusters
Run canonical-name cleanup for host/entity typos (e.g., swix/swyx, alesio/Alessio) and merge duplicates
Install ongoing alias guardrail in ingestion/refinement prompts + scheduled typo audit report
Validate graph quality: counts, no orphans, and top-connected hub placement

discord-bot-v2.title: Discord bot v2 — grounded guides, temporal context, and deterministic channel triggers
discord-bot-v2.notes: Focuses on better grounding/citations plus reliable kickoff behavior for announcement-driven discussion in yap.

tasks.text: Rewrite guides (start-here, content-types, search) with LS-specific grounding
Add deterministic kickoff path for announcement -> yap debate
Implement thread model and end-to-end channel behavior
Validate in test Discord, then promote to production server

documentation-overhaul-v2.title: Documentation overhaul v2 — second pass after data and bot refinements are complete
documentation-overhaul-v2.notes: V1 shipped. V2 is a focused refresh to align docs with final post-refinement schema, hub-node architecture, ingestion automation, and bot v2 behavior.

tasks.text: Audit docs for drift after PRD-10/11/15 completion
Update architecture, ingestion, and bot runtime docs with final flows
Refresh user-facing guides to match the finalized product
Run docs consistency pass and update onboarding/index pages
